## Meeting Purpose

[Align on LLM tracking strategies and develop a comprehensive approach to LLM optimization experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current LLM tracking methods are directional; precise quantification isn't yet possible](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Team to create a one-pager documenting various LLM optimization experiments seen across the internet](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop its own research and experimentation roadmap, potentially collaborating with a data science expert](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Emphasis on integrating LLM optimization into existing workflows and communicating value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

## Topics

### LLM Tracking Challenges

  - [Difficulty in precise tracking due to directional, repetitive searches](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Industry motivation exists to develop tracking solutions, but not technically feasible yet](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Need for a unified "talk track" to address client questions about LLM appearances](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Importance of educating clients on current limitations and focusing on actionable strategies](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

### Optimization Experiments

  - [LLMs.txt approach: formatting top links for LLM consumption](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Shadow site concept: creating LLM-optimized duplicates of content](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Reddit strategy: building authoritative presence through Q\&A posts (e.g., Monograph, Fathom)](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [On-page optimizations: testing individual elements like FAQs and summaries](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Exploring LLM search queries to inform content creation (similar to SEO for LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### Research and Development

  - [Plans to conduct first-party research to answer unique questions](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Potential collaboration with a machine learning/data science expert (Daniel's wife)](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Need to structure experiments for sound data collection and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Balancing urgency of development with resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Client Communication and Value Proposition

  - [Treating LLM optimization as a foundational tenet in client discussions](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Emphasizing GrowthX's cross-client insights and experimentation as a key differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Integrating LLM considerations into content ideation and creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Communicating ongoing efforts to develop proprietary tooling](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team members to share current LLM-related activities in the Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Jason to structure a document outlining prioritized experiments and potential client candidates](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Coordinate on selecting priority experiments and identifying suitable clients for testing](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Develop a process for each pod to adopt key LLM optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Create a public-facing resource to address common LLM optimization questions](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion during next Wednesday/Thursday LLM conversation](https://fathom.video/share/GAY3vM3sQ8bREtJ--viDDP2-C7SDUShb?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
